case_title: CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. vs. MORALES, JORGE D. et al

docket_entries.description: COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A. AS TO DEFENDANT MORALES, JORGE D. DOES 1 TO TEN SUMMONS ISSUED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          DEC-05-1997 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-03-1997 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       NOV-17-1997
JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR NOV-18-1997 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT X1

PROOF OF SERVICE OSC CALENDAR OF NOV-18-1997, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT HEARING ON NOV-18-1997, SANCTIONS AGAINT PLTF'S ATTY LORI L. GREENBERG., PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE DEC-03-1997 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF DEC-05-1997, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED IF NOT PAID BY 12-3-97. OSC TO PLTF'S ATTY LORI L GREENBERG. HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-1998 AT 02:30 PM IN DEPT 212 NOTICE SENT BY COURT

OSC CALENDAR OF JAN-21-1998, SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $200.00 FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON JAN-21-1998, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4), TO PAY SANCTIONS IMPOSED, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE FEB-06-1998 CONTINUED FROM JAN-21-1998 TO MAR-04-1998 AT 02:30 PM NOTICE SENT BY COURT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
SANCTION PAYMENT DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF CITIBANK (SOUTH DAKOTA) N.A.
